Despite estimated monthly revenues reaching up to ₹253,300, the overall risk is rated as Medium due to a fraud flag and moderate confidence levels (73%). Consequently, any lending should be approached with caution and contingent upon a thorough manual verification to resolve the fraud alert and validate actual sales patterns.
